title: Xtra Crisp Saudi-Arabian Chicken Wrap
description: A buttery, crisp, and savory brunch dish inspired by Saudi-Arabian flavors, featuring chicken bouillon powder and a hint of steam.

ingredients.name: Leaf wrap (such as collard greens or lettuce leaves)

instructions: Preheat a tandoor clay pot or a regular oven to 400°F (200°C).
In a small bowl, mix together salt, black pepper, onion powder, garlic powder, and chicken bouillon powder.
Rub the spice mixture evenly over both sides of the chicken breast.
Melt the ghee or clarified butter in the preheated pot or oven.
Sear the chicken breast for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
Transfer the chicken to a plate and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, steam the leaf wrap leaves in a steamer basket for 2-3 minutes, or until slightly softened.
Slice the cooked chicken breast into thin strips.
Assemble the wraps by placing a few slices of chicken onto a leaf wrap, followed by a dollop of Greek yogurt (if using) and a sprinkle of chopped cilantro.
